articles.title: Ottawa man killed, woman injured in Nova Scotia crash
articles.description: A man is dead and a woman is severely injured after a crash near Lunenburg, N.S., over the weekend. The RCMP says the crash happened on Highway 103 in Clearland around 3:30 p.m. Saturday.
